text: Hey Priya, how was your weekend?
Pretty chill, just stayed in mostly. You?
Same. Watched a bunch of movies, nothing exciting.
Nice. Hey did you hear about the water main break on Elm Street?
Saturday morning. The whole block was flooded. They had to shut off water to like four buildings.
That's wild. Is it fixed now?
Not yet. The city sent a crew out but apparently the pipe is old and they might have to replace the whole section.
My cousin lives on that block. I should check if she's affected.
Definitely. The buildings closer to the intersection got hit the worst.
